articles_and_content: 19 articles (17, 94–101, 105, 107…); popular election of ministers, magistrates and judges; SCJN reduced 11→9; Tribunal of Judicial Discipline created
12 articles (13, 16, 21, 32, 55, 73, 76, 78, 82, 89, 123, 129); Guard incorporated into SEDENA; civilian character removed; overrides prior SCJN ruling
Art. 28 et al.; extinguishes 7 autonomous bodies (INAI, COFECE, IFT, CRE, CNH, CONEVAL, MEJOREDU); functions to the Executive; expressly invokes Art. 135
Art. 40; new paragraphs against foreign intervention in elections and external investigation
